setup_project_flow.title: Provision of SETUP Innovation-Enabling Fund (iFUND) Assistance

details: Use WI-FOS-TTC 08-09 'Provision of iFund Assistance'.
Pre-assess request.
Use FOS-TTC 08-01, Customer Profile Form (Inventions included).
PM-FOS-TTC 08-03, Technology and Capability Building Training Assistance.
PM FOS-CON 08-01, Technical Consultancy Products and Services.
PM FOS-TTC 08-04, Packaging and Labeling.
Identify Priority Sector. If it is DOST Priority, inform customer for TNA.
Prepare TNA Plan, use FOS-TTC-08-05.
Use FOS-TTC 08-06, TNA Report and refer to WI FOS-TTC 08-02, Technology Needs Assessment for TNA related forms.
Assist customer to prepare Project Proposal.
Use FOS-TTC 08-10, SET-UP Project Proposal Format.
Review and endorse Proposal to Regional Director thru RPMO.
See WI-FOS-TTC 08-09 'Provision of iFund Assistance' for requirements to be submitted.
flow_steps.time_frame: Pacing of the proponent + 5 working days

details: Organize RTEC Team.
Send copies of Project Proposal.
RTEC members prepare their report.
Consolidate RTEC recommendations.
Approves or disapproves.
Inform the customer.
Prepare MOA with approved LIB, facilitate signing of both parties and let it notarized.
Refer to WI FOS-TTC 08-05, MOA Preparation-SETUP.
Submit to FASS the ff. Canvass, letter of approval, DTI Registration and MOA.
Use WI-FOS-TTC 08-09 'Provision of iFund Assistance'.
Collect Official Receipt with indicated released amount.
Collect 3 Post Dated Checks.
Facilitate purchases until acceptance of equipment and other assistance based on the LIB of the proposal.
Use WI-FOS-TTC 08-09 'Provision of iFund Assistance'.
Use FOS-TTC 08-03, SETUP PIS for on-going projects.
Use FOS-TTC 08-15, SETUP Status Report.
Use FOS-TTC 08-16, Monthly Monitoring Report.
Refer WI FOS-TTC 08-06, Conduct of Monitoring and Evaluation and PM FOS-TTC 08-05, Project Monitoring and Evaluation.

faqs.question: How does a SETUP iFUND project start?
faqs.answer: It starts when a client requests an S&T intervention through the PSTO, followed by pre-assessment and checking if the request falls under DOST priority sectors.

faqs.question: What happens after the request is received?
faqs.answer: The PSTO conducts a Technology Needs Assessment or TNA, prepares the TNA report, and helps the client prepare the project proposal.

faqs.question: Who evaluates the SETUP proposal?
faqs.answer: The RTEC or Regional Technical Evaluation Committee evaluates the proposal and consolidates recommendations before endorsement.

faqs.question: Who approves the SETUP iFUND assistance?
faqs.answer: The Regional Director approves or disapproves the proposal.

faqs.question: What happens after approval?
faqs.answer: A Memorandum of Agreement is prepared and signed, then the iFUND is processed and awarded.

faqs.question: What happens after the fund is released?
faqs.answer: The project enters implementation, including procurement and delivery of approved assistance, followed by monitoring and evaluation.
